top_claims.claim: identified. On reflection, we identified and analysed the issue correctly but should have reallocated capital in full. Our research also suggested Rightmove might announce an unexpected step-up in AI-related product spend, being less advanced here than peers. Concurrently at the

Rightmove is the UK’s default property search utility: high margins, net cash, and no external debt. FY2025 cash generation supports roughly 40 pence of owner cash per share; the share price near £4.43 embeds a high single-digit cash yield plus growth from ARPA, adjacent products, and buybacks. Base expected annual ret
We expect **24.29%** per year over 7 years at **~$4.434** on **$0.3988/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: FY2026–27 investment spend fails to earn incremental ARPA, compressing underlying margin toward the ~67% guided level without re-accelerating growth.
